completed_tasks.name: Batch 0/1/1B baseline scaffold and OpenAPI contract
Batch 3 OpenAPI validation and generated TypeScript contract types
completed_tasks.progress: Added API lint/type scripts, installed @redocly/cli and openapi-typescript, generated lib/api/generated/openapi-types.ts, and passed api:lint, api:types, api:types:check, typecheck, and build.

remaining_tasks.name: Commit Batch 3 if consultant passes it
Next approved micro-batch: OpenAPI contract-quality cleanup for Redocly info.license warning, if approved

human_actions_pending.action: Paste the Batch 3 result back to the consultant and wait for pass/commit guidance.
human_actions_pending.context: Batch 3 is validated but uncommitted. The only OpenAPI lint issue is a Redocly warning that info should contain a license field; api/openapi.yaml was intentionally not changed in Batch 3.

decisions.decision: Keep OpenAPI as the source of truth before writing route handlers.
decisions.rationale: Batch 3 added linting and generated TypeScript contract types only.

decisions.decision: Do not import generated types into app code yet.
decisions.rationale: Imports, route handlers, DB/auth code, UI product features, exports, and runtime traceability logic were explicitly out of scope for Batch 3.

decisions.decision: Do not modify api/openapi.yaml for the Redocly info-license warning in Batch 3.
decisions.rationale: The prompt required stopping before contract changes; lint passed with a warning, so the warning was documented for a future approved contract-quality batch.

decisions.decision: Use npm peer-resolution compatibility mode for the approved tooling install.
decisions.rationale: The first install failed because openapi-typescript@7.13.0 declares a TypeScript ^5.x peer while this project currently uses TypeScript ^6.0.3; the retry installed only the approved dev dependencies without downgrading TypeScript.

uncommitted_files.note: Lockfile update from installing @redocly/cli and openapi-typescript.
Generated by openapi-typescript from api/openapi.yaml; intended to be tracked.
Intentionally left untracked per consultant instruction.

next_action: Paste the Batch 3 result back to the consultant. If it passes, commit package.json, package-lock.json, lib/api/generated/openapi-types.ts, and ops/deltas/0003-openapi-tooling.md with a Batch 3 commit message, leaving PLAN.md untracked.
context_notes: No formal GSD phase directory exists, so this handoff uses .planning/. Batch 2A is committed at 11c36ca. Batch 3 is complete and validated but intentionally uncommitted pending consultant review. Do not add DB, auth, handlers, route handlers, UI product features, imports, exports, tests, migrations, data models, or runtime traceability logic without a new approved prompt.
